overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through an outdoor concrete skate park toward the King Baudouin Stadium on a bright sunny day. The camera follows the character smoothly as they navigate between skate ramps with the large modern stadium visible in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through an open concrete skate park on a bright sunny day. Multiple skate ramps are positioned on both sides of the path while the large King Baudouin Stadium dominates the background. The camera maintains a smooth third-person follow perspective as the character approaches the stadium.

agents.ego_description: character continues walking past the skate ramps, moving toward the left side of the stadium entrance

entered.detail: dark entrance opening in the stadium facade

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the initial skate ramps and approaches the stadium entrance. The stadium building appears larger and more detailed as the distance closes. The remaining ramps on the right side pass by as the character heads toward the left portion of the stadium entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open concrete skate park that gradually closes in on the imposing architecture of the King Baudouin Stadium. It begins with the character walking steadily along a path flanked by various skate ramps under a bright, sunny sky. As the character advances, the camera maintains a smooth follow perspective, causing the distant stadium to grow in scale and detail. The scene then shifts as the initial ramps fall away, leaving only a few remaining structures on the right while the character steers toward the left portion of the stadium entrance. Finally, the perspective tightens as the character reaches the threshold of the massive building, completing the transition from the open park to the stadium's facade.
